features.name: Home Page
features.description: Main landing page with hero section, about me, education, skills, portfolio, and contact sections

features.name: Navigation Bar
features.description: Responsive navigation bar with menu items, search functionality, and theme toggle

features.name: Portfolio Section
features.description: Interactive portfolio showcase with filtering by project type (Web/Mobile), search functionality, and animated project cards

features.name: Theme Switching
features.description: Dark/Light theme toggle functionality with animated theme switcher component

features.name: Document Download Modal
features.description: Modal component for downloading CV and Portfolio PDF documents

features.name: Social Media Links
features.description: Social media integration with links to LinkedIn, GitHub, and Instagram

features.name: Animated UI Components
features.description: Collection of animated UI components including gradient text, border beam, shimmer buttons, magic cards, and text animations

features.name: Skills Dock
features.description: Animated dock component displaying programming languages and tools skills with icons

features.name: Contact Section
features.description: Contact section with phone number, email, and social media buttons

features.name: Site Configuration
features.description: Centralized site configuration including navigation items, metadata, and links

features.name: Layout and Providers
features.description: Root layout component with theme providers and global navigation

features.name: Icons
features.description: Custom icon components for social media, theme toggle, and UI elements
